briefdescription.para: Flag to track physical state.
Flag to track repeater state.
Timeout value for 5ms.
Timeout value for 100ms.
Timeout value for 1s.
Max times to poll on BCaps Ready bit at 100ms interval.
This enumerates the Event Types for HDCP Transmitter state machine.
This enumerates the Event Types for HDCP Transmitter state machine.
This function logs a debug message on behalf of a handler state machine.
This function posts an event to a state machine.
This function starts a state machine's timer.
This function stops a state machine's timer.
This function busy delays a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the delay time in milli-seconds.

briefdescription.para: This function acts as the reauthentication callback for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function acts as the check link callback for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the check link state of the handler.
This function enables encryption for a state machine.

simplesect.para: This function inserts a 5ms delay for things to settle when encryption is actually being disabled.

briefdescription.para: This function disables encryption for a state machine.

simplesect.para: This function inserts a 5ms delay for things to settle when encryption is actually being disabled.

briefdescription.para: This function enables a state machine.
This function disables a state machine.
This function checks to ensure that the remote end is HDCP capable.
This function generates the An from a random number generator.
This function validates a KSV value as having 20 1s and 20 0s.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating valid (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function exchanges the ksvs between the two ends of the link.
This function initiates the computations for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the HDCP receiver state machine.

briefdescription.para: This function polls the progress of the computations for a state machine.
This function validates the attached receiver.
This function checks the integrity of a HDCP link.
This function checks the remote end to see if its a repeater.

simplesect.para: The implementation of this function enables encryption when a repeater is detected downstream. The standard is ambiguous as to the handling of this specific case by this behaviour is required in order to pass the Unigraf compliance test suite.

briefdescription.para: This function polls a state machine in the "wait for ready" state.
This function sets the V'H0, V'H1, V'H2, V'H3, V'H4, KSVList and BInfo values in the HDCP TX HDCP Instance for Repeater validation .
This function validates the ksv list from an attached repeater.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating valid (TRUE) or invalid (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function reads the ksv list from an attached repeater.
This function runs the "disabled" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "determine rx capable" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "exchange ksvs" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "computations" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "validate-rx" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "authenticated" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "link-integrity check" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "test-for-repeater" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "wait-for-ready" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "read-ksv-list" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "unauthenticated" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "physical-layer-down" state of the transmit state machine.
This function enters a state.
This function exits a state.
This function drives a transmit state machine.
This function processes the events pending on a state machine.
This function converts from a state to a display string.
This function installs callback functions for the given HandlerType:

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP core instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a transmit state machine.
This function polls an HDCP interface.
This function resets an HDCP interface.

simplesect.para: This function disables and then re-enables the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function enables an HDCP interface.
This function disables an HDCP interface.
This function queries an interface to check if it is enabled.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating is enabled (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function updates the physical state of an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is truth value indicating the status of physical interface.

briefdescription.para: This function set the lane count of an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of lanes of the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function set the MST/SST mode of an HDCP interface.
This function enables HDCP ECF slots.

parameterdescription.para: is the ECF timeslots to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates authentication on an interface.
This function initiates the transmitter to read READY bit from downstream and complete second part of authentication.
This function queries an interface to check if authentication is still in progress.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating in progress (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its been authenticated.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its in the computations state.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its in the wait-for-ready state.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries the downstream device to check if the downstream device is HDCP capable.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating HDCP capability (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the current encryption stream map.
This function enables encryption on set of streams on an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the bit map of streams to enable encryption on.

briefdescription.para: This function disables encryption on set of streams on an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the bit map of streams to disable encryption on.

briefdescription.para: This set a flag that allows the hdcp1x drivers to determine if the transmitter is HDMI or DVI.

parameterdescription.para: The mode value to set (typically 1 for HDMI, 0 for DVI).

briefdescription.para: This function handles a timeout on an HDCP interface.
This function returns if HDCP TX interface is connected to a downstream repeater.
This function implements the debug display output for transmit instances.
This function enables the blank output for the cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1.4 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the blank output for the cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1.4 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function acts as the downstream authentication trigger callback for a Repeater state machine, to start the second part of authentication.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of KSV List read in the downstream interface of the repeater topology.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of Depth read in the downstream interface of the repeater topology.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of Device Count read in the downstream interface of the repeater topology.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the MAX_DEPTH_EXCEEDED flag in the repeater topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of BKSV of the device connected to the repeater downstream interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the MAX_DEVICS_EXCEEDED flag in the repeater topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a pointer to the downstream Topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the XHdcp14 Topology structure or NULL when the topology info is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function enables HDCP ECF slots.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of timeslots to enable ECF for.
